body.title: Task-class-aware LLM routing in thalamus
body.result: Subsumed into D327 inference restructure. Intent classification already in thalamus.py. Tier→model mapping in inference_gateway.py. TWM context builder routes by tier. No separate implementation needed.
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/kernel.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/kernel.py
body.description: D316: route by task class not just availability. Add intent class detection at thalamus entry (code_task / reasoning / procedural / recall / conversation). Route: recall→tier1 graph only, conversation→Ollama 1b, procedural→qwen2.5, code_task+reasoning→DeepSeek-R1 batch (OR). Currently all fallthrough hits same Ollama path regardless of task class. Required_files: wild_igor/igor/cognition/thalamus.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/cluster_router.py
body.approved_plan: Edit thalamus.py to add intent-class-aware tier mapping. Also needs cluster_router changes for model_for(intent). No HIGH inertia files needed — original plan to touch kernel.py was overscoped.
body.approval_notes: Approved — thalamus.py + cluster_router only, no kernel.py. Subsumed into T-inference-restructure.
